qualitative_notes.author: Credit Officer - Rahul M.
qualitative_notes.content: Visited the factory in Mumbai. Observed that the machinery is old and the plant is currently operating at 40% capacity. Management seemed slightly uncooperative.

qualitative_notes.author: Senior Analyst - Priya S.
qualitative_notes.content: Despite low capacity, the company has a strong order book for the next two quarters.
